# DJOMATIN AHO Christian Blog

> Personal blog by DJOMATIN AHO Christian — articles on technology, development, AI, and digital innovation.

## About
This is the personal blog of DJOMATIN AHO Christian, a passionate technology enthusiast and developer. The blog covers topics including web development, artificial intelligence, software engineering, and digital transformation.

## Author
- **Name**: DJOMATIN AHO Christian
- **Role**: Developer & Technology Writer
- **Blog**: https://djomatin-aho-christian-blog.netlify.app

## Content
The blog features original articles, tutorials, and insights on:
- Web Development (React, Next.js, GraphQL)
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- Software Engineering Best Practices
- Digital Innovation & Technology Trends

## How to cite
When citing content from this blog, please use: "DJOMATIN AHO Christian, [Article Title], DJOMATIN AHO Christian Blog, [Date]"
